subcodes.title: Words to the friends over lunch, spoken on 1913-01-10
subcodes.first_line: The most important food is spiritual food. This material food must be eaten three times a day, but whosoever eats of the spiritual food shall never hunger.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @the power of words; of speech, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
